recipe.title: German Goulash
recipe.instructions:
Cut roast in 1 inch cubes. In Dutch oven, brown meat, and onions in oil. Add water, bouillon cubes, flour, tomato sauce, paprika, and pepper. Simmer low for 2 hours, until meat is tender.
Serve over egg noodles.
This dish cooks up very well in a crock pot.
recipe.summary: German Goulash might be a good recipe to expand your main course repertoire. This recipe makes 4 servings with 550 calories, 66g of protein, and 26g of fat each. From preparation to the plate, this recipe takes approximately 45 minutes. It is a good option if you're following a dairy free diet. With a spoonacular score of 85%, this dish is super.
